synthesis: The Trump administration has issued subpoenas to New York Times journalists as part of a federal grand jury investigation into the unauthorized release of classified information concerning a new presidential aircraft. While the investigation focuses on the leak itself, the reporting originally highlighted security concerns regarding a Boeing 747-8 gifted by Qatar. The Department of Justice has stated that the reporters are not the targets of the criminal investigation.
confidence: HIGH; Both sources agree on the core facts regarding the issuance of subpoenas and the involvement of a federal grand jury investigating leaks related to the aircraft.
